title: Temere Supellectilem
description: Adds miscellaneous blocks & items I felt like adding!
body:
This mod just adds some blocks & items I feel like adding into the game. -w-

Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/

## [Recipes for Black Nether Bricks]
You also make Black Nether Brick by smelting normal Nether Brick.
![Recipes for Black Nether Bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8f8c54004631bc16140a5c2162c65567de6e8ee.gif)
